title: elaphoglossum habbemense
intro: Elaphoglossum habbemense is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, commonly known as the Habbemense Elaphoglossum or Elaphoglossum fern. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum habbemense include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce swelling and promote wound healing. Elaphoglossum habbemense can be prepared as a herbal infusion by steeping the leaves in hot water, or as a decoction by boiling the roots and leaves in water.
